name: Ukrainian SSR (1919–1929)

colors.symbolism: the revolutionary struggle of the working class
the Cyrillic abbreviation of the republic's name

description: A red field with the gold Cyrillic letters У.С.С.Р. (UkrSSR) in the upper hoist.
history: Adopted on 10 March 1919 as the first official flag of the Ukrainian Soviet Socialist Republic. The letters У.С.С.Р. are the Russian-language acronym (Ukrainskaya Sotsialisticheskaya Sovetskaya Respublika) of the republic. Replaced in 1929 by a redesigned version using the Ukrainian-language acronym.

features.role: Cyrillic letters У.С.С.Р. (UkrSSR — the Russian-language acronym for the Ukrainian Soviet Socialist Republic)
